reasoning: Egypt is one of three contenders for the 2026 ITKF World Championship, and its sports minister has met with the ITKF president to discuss hosting, showing strong political will. With the 2024 championship having taken place in late 2024 and contenders narrowed down by November 2024, the host decision is highly likely to be announced in 2025. However, since no announcement was found up to the May 8, 2025 knowledge cutoff, there are only about 50 days left before the July 1 deadline. Assuming Egypt has a ~40-50% chance of winning the bid against the two other contenders, and a ~60% chance that the decision is announced before July 2025, the overall probability is around 28%.
batch_queries: Before July 1, 2025, will the International Traditional Karate Federation announce that Egypt has been chosen to host the 2026 Traditional Karate World Championship?
